query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  SUM(CASE WHEN debt_range IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS null_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN debt_range IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS non_null_count
FROM debt_collected_cache;
